w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Phố Ẩm Thực Vĩnh Khánh - Hệ Thống Du Lịch Thông Minh
| Status: Draft | Prepared by: Product Owner + BA

Xây dựng hệ thống du lịch ẩm thực tích hợp GPS + Audio Guide tự động cho Phố Ẩm Thực Vĩnh Khánh. Du khách có trải nghiệm tương tác qua di động, được tự động hướng dẫn khi vào khu vực quán ăn (geofence). Admin/Chủ quán quản lý POI, nội dung đa ngôn ngữ, tour từ web dashboard.
G1: Tạo trải nghiệm du lịch ẩm thực tương tác (interactive) qua mobile app
G2: Tự động phát audio thuyết minh khi du khách vào geofence POI (hands-free experience)
G3: Cung cấp giao diện quản lý (web dashboard) cho admin & chủ quán cập nhật POI/content/tour
G4: Hỗ trợ đa ngôn ngữ (Vi, En, Zh) với fallback tự động
G5: Theo dõi hành vi du khách (play history, stats) để tối ưu hóa trải nghiệm
G6: Hỗ trợ trigger ngoài GPS (QR code) cho trường hợp GPS không available
• Khám phá & xem danh sách POI trên map
• Geofence trigger: tự động phát audio khi vào khu vực (foreground GPS)
• Xem chi tiết POI (text, images, audio)
• Tham gia tour hệ thống (system tour)
• Scan QR code để trigger nội dung (không cần GPS)
• Quản lý nội dung theo ngôn ngữ (title, description, images, audio)
• CRUD Tour & sắp xếp thứ tự POI
• Xem thống kê cơ bản (top POIs, play history)
• Quản lý quyền (Admin vs POI Owner)
• Geofence logic (tính khoảng cách, ưu tiên POI)
Background GPS tracking & continuous location logging
Explore POIs, listen to audio guides, join tours
View POI, play audio, join tour, scan QR
Manage entire system: POIs, content, tours, users
Manage own POI content, view stats
Edit own POI + content, view own stats
As Guest, I want to see list of POIs on map so I can explore restaurants nearby
As Guest, I want audio to auto-play when I enter POI
As Guest, I want to see POI details (text, images, audio) so I can learn about the place
As Guest, I want to select language (Vi/En/Zh
so I understand content in my preferred language
As Guest, I want to join a system tour so I can follow a curated route
As Guest, I want to scan QR code to trigger POI content without needing GPS
As Admin, I want to create/edit/delete POIs with coordinates & radius so I can manage restaurants
As Admin, I want to upload images & audio files for
As Admin, I want to manage POI
As Admin, I want to create system tours with ordered
As Admin, I want to view top POIs & play statistics so I can analyze engagement
As POI Owner, I want to edit only my POI content so I can keep info
name, latitude, longitude, trigger_radius (10-1000m), priority (1-5), status (active/inactive)
FR-POI-2: Admin can READ POI list in map view & table view (with pagination)
FR-POI-3: Admin can UPDATE POI details (location, radius, priority, status)
FR-POI-4: Admin can DELETE POI (soft delete: set is_active=false)
FR-POI-5: POI Owner can only edit own POI (checked by owner_id match)
FR-POI-6: Deleted POI should not appear in guest mobile app
FR-CONT-1: Admin/Owner can ADD/EDIT POI content per language (Vietnamese, English, Chinese)
title, description, images (JSONB array of URLs), audio_file_url, tts_script
FR-CONT-3: Admin/Owner can UPLOAD images to file storage (or use external CDN)
FR-CONT-4: Admin/Owner can UPLOAD audio files (or provide TTS script)
FR-CONT-5: If POI has no content in selected language
FR-CONT-6: If both language & Vietnamese missing
FR-CONT-7: Mobile displays: title, description, image carousel, audio player (in that order)
FR-GEO-1: Mobile app continuously monitors guest location (foreground GPS only in MVP)
FR-GEO-2: Calculate distance between guest location & each POI using: sqrt((lat1-lat
FR-GEO-4: Select POI from candidates by priority: [nearest POI] or [highest priority] or [tour POI in order]
FR-GEO-5: Auto-play POI content (audio + text) if guest enters geofence
FR-GEO-6: Debounce: prevent duplicate trigger for same POI within 30s (cooldown)
FR-GEO-7: Auto-stop audio when: guest leaves geofence, manual stop, or POI switched
FR-GEO-8: Only 1 audio playing at a time (queue management)
FR-TOUR-1: Admin can CREATE system tour
name, description, is_system=true, list of POIs in order
FR-TOUR-2: Admin can EDIT tour (reorder POIs, update name/description)
FR-TOUR-3: Admin can DELETE tour (soft delete)
FR-TOUR-4: Guest can VIEW all available tours and JOIN a tour
FR-TOUR-6: Geofence trigger respects tour order: POIs in tour play in sequence
FR-TOUR-7: Personal tours (guest-created) deferred to v2.0
FR-QR-1: Admin can GENERATE QR code for each POI
FR-QR-2: Guest can SCAN QR code via mobile app camera
FR-QR-4: QR trigger does NOT require GPS (works anywhere)
FR-QR-5: Play event logs trigger_type=QR (not GEOFENCE)
FR-QR-6: QR codes have no expiry (permanent, can be toggled active/inactive)
FR-ANA-1: System logs PLAY HISTORY whenever audio plays: (session_id, poi_id, trigger_type, language, played_at, duration_seconds)
FR-ANA-2: Admin can VIEW TOP 10 POIs by play count (past 7/30 days)
FR-ANA-3: Admin can VIEW average listening duration per POI
FR-ANA-4: System tracks location per session for future heatmap (store in user_locations table, max 1 record per 10s)
FR-ANA-5: No heatmap visualization in MVP (just logging infrastructure)
at location within 100m of POI with trigger_radius=100 & content exists in selected language
WHEN guest location updates & distance ≤ trigger_radius
THEN audio plays automatically + text displays + play_history
WHEN guest re-enters same geofence within cooldown period
Audio is playing for POI X
WHEN guest moves > trigger_radius away from POI
THEN audio stops automatically + fallback to previous queue (if any)
Guest taps POI from list/map, selected language is English
title, description, image carousel, audio player
POI has Vi & En content, but no Chinese
AND displays message: "Content available in Vietnamese"
Guest selects "Tour A" from tour list
AND POIs in geofence check respects tour order
AND UI shows "Tour A" badge on POI card
Guest has QR code for POI X
WHEN Admin fills: name, lat, lng, radius=200m, priority=3, clicks Save
AND appears in POI list within 2s
Admin on POI content edit form, selects Vietnamese language
WHEN Admin fills: title, description, uploads 3 images, uploads audio file, clicks Save
AND appears in mobile app within 5s (or after cache refresh)
Admin on tour creation, selects 5 POIs & orders them
WHEN Admin fills: name, description, drag POIs to order, clicks Save
THEN tour saved with order_index per POI
AND appears in guest tour list
AND geofence respects tour order (POI-1, POI-2, ...)
POI Owner edits own POI content
Owner A logged in, POI owned by Owner A
BUT Owner A cannot edit POI owned by Owner B (403 Forbidden)
AND Owner A cannot see Owner B POI edit form
WHEN Admin selects "Past 7 days" & clicks "Top POIs"
THEN shows table: [POI Name, Play Count, Avg Duration]
S1: Home Screen - Map view + POI list (nearby POIs)
S2: POI Detail Screen - Title, description, images, audio player, "Join Tour" button (if applicable)
S3: Language Selector - Dropdown: Vietnamese | English | Chinese
S4: Tour List - System tours available, [Join] button
S5: QR Scanner - Camera view, scan POI QR code
S6: Playing Screen - Currently playing POI (full-screen audio player + text)
S7: Settings - Language preference, location permission, about
W2: POI List - Table of all POIs, [Create], [Edit], [Delete],
W3: POI Edit/Create - Form: name, lat/lng (map picker), radius, priority, status, owner
W4: POI Content Manage - Language tabs (Vi/En/Zh), edit title/description, upload images, upload audio/TTS script
W5: Tour List - Table of tours, [Create], [Edit], [Delete]
W6: Tour Edit/Create - Form: name, description, drag POIs to order
W7: Analytics Dashboard - Top POIs table, avg duration, play history timeline
W8: QR Management - Generate QR per POI, download QR image, toggle active/inactive
W9: User Management - Admin only, list users, [Create], [Edit], [Delete]
Loading: Spinner while fetching POI list / content
Empty: "No POIs found" message (if distance > max trigger_radius)
Error: "Failed to load POIs. Please try again." with [Retry] button
Offline: "No internet connection" (MVP shows error, offline mode in v2.0)
Cooldown: "Just played this POI, try again in 30s" (if re-trigger same POI too soon)
POI selection when multiple in range
NFR-AUTH-1: JWT tokens expire after 24 hours
NFR-AUTH-3: Mobile app guests do NOT login (sessionless, device_id only)
NFR-AUTH-4: POI Owner can only edit own POI (checked server-side)
NFR-AUTH-5: API enforces role-based access (ADMIN > OWNER > GUEST)
NFR-VAL-7: Language code: vi | en | zh only
NFR-ERR-1: HTTP 400 Bad Request for invalid input (with message)
NFR-ERR-2: HTTP 401 Unauthorized for auth failures
NFR-ERR-3: HTTP 403 Forbidden for permission denied
NFR-ERR-4: HTTP 404 Not Found for missing resource
NFR-ERR-5: HTTP 500 Internal Server Error for unexpected failures
NFR-ERR-6: Mobile app shows user-friendly error messages (no stack traces)
NFR-PERF-1: API response time < 200ms (95th percentile) for 80% of requests
NFR-PERF-4: Cache POI list in Redis (TTL: 1h)
NFR-PERF-5: Cache tour list in Redis (TTL: 1h)
NFR-PERF-6: Mobile map renders 500 POI pins in < 3s
NFR-LOG-1: All play events logged to play_history table (for analytics)
NFR-LOG-2: All API errors logged with request ID, timestamp, user ID, endpoint
NFR-LOG-3: Location updates logged max 1 per 10s (to prevent log explosion)
POIs: log deleted POI ID & timestamp
NFR-AVAIL-1: API uptime target: 99% (maintenance windows scheduled)
NFR-AVAIL-2: Database backup: daily full backup, weekly archive
NFR-AVAIL-3: Graceful degradation: if geofence fails, show list view instead
D1: Google Maps SDK (map rendering & location services)
D3: Audio player library (Flutter audio_players or native)
D4: Backend API availability (REST over HTTP/HTTPS)
D6: Redis cache (optional but recommended for MVP)
D7: File storage (local server or CDN for images/audio)
Large audio files slow down mobile app & battery drain
Stream from CDN, compress audio, cache locally (v2.0)
Provide offline mode in v2.0 with pre-cached data
MVP: foreground only; use system geofence API (v2.0)
Unit test distance calc, test with real GPS data
Admin creates multiple QRs for same POI
Add validation: 1 active QR per POI
Load test, use Redis caching, optimize DB queries
Q1: Expected POI count at launch? (10, 50, 500+?)
Q3: Audio files hosted where? (local server, AWS S3, CDN?)
Q4: Should QR codes have expiry? (yes/no)
affects tech choice (polling vs system API)
Q6: Should heatmap be in MVP or strictly v2.0?
Q7: Will there be "test mode" POIs for development?
Q8: Should admin approve POI Owner content before publishing?
Q9: Multi-device sync for guests? (no in MVP, just session-based)
Q10: Dark mode for mobile/web? (no in MVP)
FE1: Heatmap visualization (aggregate user location heat)
FE3: User reviews & ratings for POIs
FE4: Real-time notifications (new POI, event reminder)
FE5: Offline mode (cached POI data + audio)
FE6: Social sharing (tour link, POI review)
FE7: Text-to-Speech synthesis (eliminate audio file need)
FE9: Analytics dashboard (advanced: user journey, conversion funnel)
FE10: Multi-user tour session (guests walk tour together, sync location)
